title: The War at Marineford Begins: Rising Conflict

dialogue.text: I cannot allow you to see him!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Cap'n ace!! What are you doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
